pronunciation: /藞ma瑟lsto蕣nz 瑟n 藞m蓱d蓹rn 蓹藞m蓻r瑟k蓹n 藞h瑟st蓹ri/
englishDefinitions: Important events or turning points in recent American history.
persianTranslation: 賳賯丕胤 毓胤賮 丿乇 鬲丕乇蹖禺 賲毓丕氐乇 丌賲乇蹖讴丕
乇賵蹖丿丕丿賴丕蹖 賲賴賲 丿乇 鬲丕乇蹖禺 賲丿乇賳 丌賲乇蹖讴丕
examples: The Civil Rights Movement is one of the milestones in modern American history.
The lecture covered several milestones in modern American history.
Students studied milestones in modern American history from the 20th century.
synonyms: key events in modern American history
